case_title: ROBERTO TOSCANO ET AL VS. RAY FISHER ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,697.05 FILED BY TOSCANO, ROBERTO PADILLA DE RIVAS, ANA MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, RAY FISHER, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2024 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN) SERVED FEB-24-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, RAY
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY TOSCANO, ROBERTO PADILLA DE RIVAS, ANA MARIA FISHER, RAY FISHER, DAVID
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED. SERVED MAR-07-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFFS ROBERTO TOSCANO AND ANA MARIA PADILLA DE RIVAS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS RAY FISHER AND DAVID FISHER ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ANA MARIA PADILLA DE RIVAS IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER ROSARIO DEL PILAR ESPINOSA. THE COURT DISMISSED THE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT RAY FISHER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PADILLA DE RIVAS, ANA MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FISHER, DAVID $371.33 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $421.33, DEFENDANT DAVID FISHER SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ANA MARIA PADILLA DE RIVAS $371.33 UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 3342. COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT RAY FISHER IS NOT A PROPER PARTY AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED AS TO HIM. PLAINTIFF ROBERTO TOSCANO FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN AS TO THE VET BILLS AND SHALL TAKE NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
